items.title: Impact of AI on cyber threat from now to 2027

items.title: A method to assess 'forgivable' vs 'unforgivable' vulnerabilities
items.summary: Research from the NCSC designed to eradicate vulnerability classes and make the top-level mitigations easier to implement.
items.executive_summary: Research from the NCSC designed to eradicate vulnerability classes and make the top-level mitigations easier to implement.

items.title: The near-term impact of AI on the cyber threat
items.summary: An NCSC assessment focusing on how AI will impact the efficacy of cyber operations and the implications for the cyber threat over the next two years.
items.executive_summary: An NCSC assessment focusing on how AI will impact the efficacy of cyber operations and the implications for the cyber threat over the next two years.

items.summary: Key findings and full report from the 6th year of the Active Cyber Defence (ACD) programme.

items.title: Cyber Threat Report: UK Legal Sector
items.summary: An updated report from the NCSC explaining how UK law firms - of all sizes - can protect themselves from common cyber threats.
items.executive_summary: An updated report from the NCSC explaining how UK law firms - of all sizes - can protect themselves from common cyber threats.

items.title: The threat from commercial cyber proliferation
items.summary: Report informing readers about the threat to UK industry and society from commercial cyber tools and services.

items.title: Threat report on application stores
items.summary: This report outlines the risks associated with the use of official and third party app stores.

items.summary: Assessing the security of network equipment.
items.executive_summary: Assessing the security of network equipment.

items.summary: The 2nd joint report between the NCSC and KPMG UK benchmarks against the 2020 findings to gauge what progress has been made.
items.executive_summary: The 2nd joint report between the NCSC and KPMG UK benchmarks against the 2020 findings to gauge what progress has been made.

items.title: Decrypting diversity: Diversity and inclusion in cyber security report 2020
items.summary: Joint report between the NCSC and KPMG UK is the first in a series to benchmark and track levels of diversity and inclusion in the cyber security industry.
items.executive_summary: Joint report between the NCSC and KPMG UK is the first in a series to benchmark and track levels of diversity and inclusion in the cyber security industry.

items.title: The cyber threat to sports organisations
items.summary: The NCSC report highlights the cyber threats faced by the sports sector and suggests how to stop or lessen their impact on organisations.

items.title: Summary of the NCSC analysis of May 2020 US sanction

items.executive_summary: A summary of the NCSC’s analysis of the May 2020 US sanction which caused the NCSC to modify the scope of its security mitigation strategy for Huawei.
